title: Form-data payload size exceeds limit for large files
symptom: When uploading PDF files over 200MB, the form and webhook do not show the binary file and do not fail, leading to silent errors.
applies_when: Uploading large files via form-data or webhook
Environment variables set for payload size
not_this_if: Using a different method to upload files
root_cause: The default maximum file size for form-data uploads in n8n is set to 200MiB. If the uploaded file exceeds this limit, it will not be processed correctly, resulting in silent failures without error messages.
fix_steps: Set the environment variable N8N_FORMDATA_FILE_SIZE_MAX to a value greater than the file size you want to upload (e.g., 300MiB).
Restart the n8n instance to apply the changes.
agent_instruction: Increase the N8N_FORMDATA_FILE_SIZE_MAX environment variable and restart n8n.
